features: 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: Wine bottle holders are crafted with heavy-duty thick paper that is waterproof and durable. It is laminated with holographic paper
𝐕𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐔𝐒 𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐊𝐒: The holographic bags come in various packs. There are 3, 12, 25 50, 100 pieces packs available; choose according to your need
𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: These paper great party bags come with a rope handle. Sturdy rope and reinforced bottom seal ensures the bottle is secure inside the bags
𝐑𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐎𝐌 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐎𝐔𝐑: You can get these eye-catching bottle wrapper bags in random assorted colours. It comes in red, blue, green, silver, gold, purple colour and so on
𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐓𝐎 𝐔𝐒𝐄: The wine bottle bag is very easy to use. Simply just put your bottle inside the bag and pull the rope to fit the bottles inside it perfectly
description: KAV introduces paper holographic bags for holding a bottle that is crafted with heavy-duty thick paper. The bags come in packs of 3, 12, 25 50, 100 pieces where you will find assorted colours. The holographic films are elegantly designed on the bags. It is always so difficult finding many bottle bags with good value. It has a rope. With the rope, you can easily tighten up the package by having your bottle inside it. The bottle bag's size is perfect for gifting fine wine, spirits, liquor, and champagne during festive celebrations and special occasions. You can also use them on Teachers day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, birthdays, housewarming, dinner parties and more. Features: Bottle bags with a rope holder Heavy-duty holographic Paper Crafted with durable thick paper Comes in different packs Random colours will be provided Rope pulling mechanism Bottles can be put and tightened up easily Suitable for gifting fine wine, spirits, liquor, and champagne Worthy for thanksgiving, dinner parties and special occasions
